## Problem

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it matters

Explain the user value or production benefit.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any workaround or alternative you tried.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, mockups, or sample workflows if useful.
